might.name: Might
might.description: Brute strength and speed used to lift, break, or overpower obstacles.
might.mechanicalEffects: Each Attribute begins with 1 dot. You distribute extra dots per Arena priority (6/4/2 among the three Attributes in that Arena), then add +2 dots to every Attribute that shares your Favored Approach (Force, Finesse, or Resilience), to a maximum of 5 dots per Attribute at creation (redistribute overflow within the same Arena). Pools pair a Skill with one Attribute.
might.source: Scion_Origin_(Revised_Download).pdf, Character Creation (Attributes), pp. 97–98; Attributes and Approaches, p. 63

dexterity.name: Dexterity
dexterity.description: Deftness, coordination, and agility for fine movement and precision.
dexterity.mechanicalEffects: Same dot rules as other Attributes (see might). Often pairs with Skills for precise physical actions.

stamina.name: Stamina
stamina.description: Vital toughness, endurance, and staying power.
stamina.mechanicalEffects: Same dot rules as other Attributes. One of the Resilience Attributes used for Defense when you take a Defensive action (often Stamina). Extra Bruised Injury slots at Stamina 3–4 or 5 at creation.

intellect.name: Intellect
intellect.description: Genius, memorized knowledge, and forceful application of mental power.
intellect.mechanicalEffects: Same dot rules as other Attributes.

cunning.name: Cunning
cunning.description: Quick-wittedness, clever improvisation, and mental agility.
cunning.mechanicalEffects: Same dot rules as other Attributes.

resolve.name: Resolve
resolve.description: Discipline, focus, and attention to detail under pressure.
resolve.mechanicalEffects: Same dot rules as other Attributes. Resilience Attribute option for Defense.

presence.name: Presence
presence.mechanicalEffects: Same dot rules as other Attributes.

manipulation.name: Manipulation
manipulation.description: Subtle social graces, nuance, and fine-tuned influence.
manipulation.mechanicalEffects: Same dot rules as other Attributes.

composure.name: Composure
composure.description: Keeping cool, deflecting pressure, and social endurance.
composure.mechanicalEffects: Same dot rules as other Attributes. Resilience Attribute option for Defense.
